description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed human figure standing upright on a rounded base. The figure is draped in flowing garments with detailed folds, and holds a circular object in one hand while the other arm is bent, possibly holding a scroll or another item. The head appears to be slightly damaged or incomplete, with missing or eroded features. The surface of the sculpture is textured, suggesting it is made from stone or a similar material, and there are visible signs of wear and weathering. The overall form is classical and reminiscent of ancient Greco-Roman statuary, with a dignified and formal posture.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of a robed human figure holding a circular object, with detailed drapery and a rounded base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full robed figure, the circular object in the left hand, and the detailed folds of the garment.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the arm holding the circular object, and the layered drapery.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the back of the robe, some surface damage, and the overall silhouette of the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bent arm, the side of the head, and the rounded base.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the background is plain and isolated.
